title: Excipient Supplier Qualification Lifecycle
alt: Five-step process for qualifying excipient suppliers, from risk assessment to ongoing re-qualification

items.label: Formalised risk assessment
items.desc: Rate the excipient and supply chain under ICH Q9 to set a risk tier

items.label: Build qualification dossier
items.desc: Gather questionnaire, GMP certs, CoA and full supply-chain map

items.label: Audit the manufacturer
items.desc: On-site audit for critical suppliers, not just the distributor

items.label: Control approved material
items.desc: Identity testing, quality agreements and change notification

items.label: Monitor and re-qualify
items.desc: Track performance and re-qualify on a risk-driven cycle
